reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience you've had! I completely understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. To help us fix this, please contact us at support@fantachat.ai with details of the issues you faced. We are prioritizing your feedback to ensure a better experience. Thank you!
reply_zh: 你好，对于您所经历的不愉快体验，我深表歉意！我完全理解您的沮丧，并对给您带来的不便表示诚挚的歉意。为了帮助我们解决这个问题，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们，并提供您所遇问题的详细信息。我们正在优先处理您的反馈，以确保提供更好的体验。谢谢！
